assumptions: Design is fully approved and locked from prior session — no re-litigation
Provider cards use 3-column grid with per-model rows; utilization bar not dot pills
Model-to-provider mapping derived client-side from provider.activeModelIds + recentCompletions
No standalone component files — ConcurrencyGauge, ProviderCard, RecentCompletionsFeed are inline functions inside ExecutionProgress.tsx
Codex model unavailable — Claude implements directly
discovery.summary: Design approved and locked. 2-wave plan: Wave 1 = API data layer (totalRetries field + byModel fragment, ~25 lines). Wave 2 = ExecutionProgress.tsx full rewrite + RunProgress.tsx prop passthrough (~200 lines). All design decisions are locked from prior session.
